name: Blazer
bio:
A knight turned undead, who gained power through a deal with a demon. As a Wraith Rider filled with a desire for revenge, he became a member of the Demon Army to hunt down traitors.

Role: Magical Burst
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero with high burst damage output and low-HP self-healing ability.

skillSlots.name: Specter Lash
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy column with most Heroes for 150% M.DMG with 60% probability to apply 1 stack of [Infect].

skillSlots.name: Soul Incineration
skillSlots.description: Attacks single enemy target for 280% M.DMG; gains 50% extra Crit Rate when attacking [Infect] targets.
